overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) showing a character walking through a 1960s New Orleans-inspired urban area. The character progresses from a residential street with Creole cottages down to a waterfront promenade with a lighthouse, passing vintage cars, pedestrians, and period-appropriate architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with historic Creole cottages

events.description: yellow vintage car drives past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past pedestrians and vintage cars

notable_agents.action: white vintage sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk
woman in light dress walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: historic two-story wooden homes with wraparound porches and shutters
mature leafy trees casting dappled shadows on the sidewalk
wooden utility poles with crossbars and overhead wires
white 1950s sedan parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit residential sidewalk lined with historic Creole cottages on the right and trees on the left. A white vintage car is parked along the street while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The atmosphere is bright and summery with strong shadows cast by the midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk approaching corner with telephone booth

events.description: turning left around the corner of the blue shotgun house

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing a red telephone booth and turning down a side path

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red and silver public telephone booth with glass panels
single-story blue wooden house with porch and dark shutters

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the sidewalk past a vintage white car and approaches a red telephone booth. The path turns left around a blue shotgun house, transitioning from the main street to a narrower side path. Street trees recede into the background as the character rounds the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: sloped path descending to waterfront with dappled shade

events.description: water and lighthouse come into view as the path descends toward the waterfront
path levels out onto the concrete waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: walking down the sloped path toward the waterfront, passing other pedestrians coming up the hill

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking up the slope toward the camera

entered.detail: white lighthouse on rocky outcrop extending into the water
weathered wooden piers and retaining walls along the shoreline
boulders and rocks along the water's edge
open-air wooden pavilion with columns near the water

segments.scene_description: The character descends a sloped path that reveals the waterfront and a white lighthouse in the distance. The environment transitions from urban residential to waterfront, with wooden docks and rocky shoreline becoming visible on the left. The path is shaded by overhead trees as it winds down toward the water level.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with benches and newsstand

events.description: passing elderly man sitting on park bench reading a newspaper

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront promenade past benches and a green newsstand

notable_agents.action: elderly man sitting on bench reading, wearing a hat
woman in athletic wear walking ahead on the promenade

entered.detail: green wooden newsstand with magazines and newspapers displayed on racks
wooden slatted benches with people seated

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open waterfront promenade in bright sunlight. A white lighthouse stands in the distance to the left while a green newsstand and park benches line the right side. The character passes an elderly man reading on a bench and approaches the newsstand as the lighthouse recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit residential neighborhood that gradually opens into a bright waterfront promenade. It begins on a sidewalk lined with historic Creole cottages and vintage cars, moving past pedestrians under the strong shadows of a midday sun. As the character proceeds, the path turns left around a blue shotgun house, transitioning from the main street into a narrower side path where the urban architecture begins to recede. The scene then shifts as the camera descends a shaded, sloped path, revealing a white lighthouse in the distance and the rocky shoreline of the waterfront. Finally, the environment opens into a wide, sun-drenched promenade featuring a green newsstand and park benches, passing an elderly man as the lighthouse recedes into the background.
